Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
\\$bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(256, 256\)
\\$g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\(\\$bmp\)
\\$g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(22, 27, 46\)\)
\\$brush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(88, 101, 242\)\)
\\$g.FillEllipse\(\\$brush, 20, 20, 216, 216\)
\\$pen = New-Object System.Drawing.Pen\([System.Drawing.Color]::White, 12\)
\\$g.DrawLine\(\\$pen, 85, 128, 115, 158\)
\\$g.DrawLine\(\\$pen, 115, 158, 175, 98\)
\\$icon = [System.Drawing.Icon]::FromHandle\(\\$bmp.GetHicon\(\)\)
\\$stream = [System.IO.File]::OpenWrite\('C:\\\\Users\\\\adamp\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\better bot runner\\\\assets\\\\icon.ico'\)
\\$icon.Save\(\\$stream\)
\\$stream.Close\(\)
\\$g.Dispose\(\)
\\$bmp.Dispose\(\)
Write-Host 'Icon created'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing

function Make-Shield\(\\$size, \\$outPath\) {
  \\$bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(\\$size, \\$size\)
  \\$g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\(\\$bmp\)
  \\$g.SmoothingMode = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.SmoothingMode]::AntiAlias
  \\$g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::Transparent\)

  \\$s = \\$size / 256.0
  \\$shieldBrush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(88, 101, 242\)\)
  \\$shieldPoints = @\(
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(128*\\$s, 28*\\$s\),
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(220*\\$s, 68*\\$s\),
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(220*\\$s, 148*\\$s\),
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(128*\\$s, 228*\\$s\),
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(36*\\$s,  148*\\$s\),
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(36*\\$s,  68*\\$s\)
  \)
  \\$g.FillPolygon\(\\$shieldBrush, \\$shieldPoints\)

  \\$hlBrush = New-Object System.Drawing.SolidBrush\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(110, 125, 255\)\)
  \\$innerPoints = @\(
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(128*\\$s, 50*\\$s\),
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(198*\\$s, 82*\\$s\),
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(198*\\$s, 148*\\$s\),
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(128*\\$s, 206*\\$s\),
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(58*\\$s,  148*\\$s\),
    [System.Drawing.PointF]::new\(58*\\$s,  82*\\$s\)
  \)
  \\$g.FillPolygon\(\\$hlBrush, \\$innerPoints\)

  \\$pw = [Math]::Max\(4, 16*\\$s\)
  \\$pen = New-Object System.Drawing.Pen\([System.Drawing.Color]::White, \\$pw\)
  \\$pen.StartCap = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.LineCap]::Round
  \\$pen.EndCap   = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.LineCap]::Round
  \\$pen.LineJoin = [System.Drawing.Drawing2D.LineJoin]::Round
  \\$g.DrawLine\(\\$pen, 80*\\$s, 128*\\$s, 112*\\$s, 162*\\$s\)
  \\$g.DrawLine\(\\$pen, 112*\\$s, 162*\\$s, 176*\\$s, 96*\\$s\)

  \\$bmp.Save\(\\$outPath, [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\)
  \\$g.Dispose\(\)
  \\$bmp.Dispose\(\)
}

Make-Shield 512  'C:\\\\Users\\\\adamp\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\better bot runner\\\\assets\\\\icon.png'
Make-Shield 1024 'C:\\\\Users\\\\adamp\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\better bot runner\\\\assets\\\\icon@2x.png'
Make-Shield 256  'C:\\\\Users\\\\adamp\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\better bot runner\\\\assets\\\\icon256.png'
Make-Shield 128  'C:\\\\Users\\\\adamp\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\better bot runner\\\\assets\\\\icon128.png'
Make-Shield 64   'C:\\\\Users\\\\adamp\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\better bot runner\\\\assets\\\\icon64.png'
Make-Shield 32   'C:\\\\Users\\\\adamp\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\better bot runner\\\\assets\\\\icon32.png'
Make-Shield 16   'C:\\\\Users\\\\adamp\\\\OneDrive\\\\Desktop\\\\better bot runner\\\\assets\\\\icon16.png'
Write-Host 'PNG icons generated'
")
